an1.278:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no opportunity for two wheel-turning kings to arise simultaneously in one world-system. That is not possible.
an1.278:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for one wheel-turning king to arise in one world-system. That is possible."
an1.279:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no opportunity for a woman to be an *arahant* who is a fully enlightened Buddha. That is not possible.
an1.279:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for a man to be an *arahant* who is a fully enlightened Buddha. That is possible."
an1.280:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no opportunity for a woman to be a wheel-turning king. That is not possible.
an1.280:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for a man to be a wheel-turning king. That is possible."
an1.281-283:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no opportunity for a woman to hold the position of Sakka … the position of Māra … the position of Brahmā. That is not possible.
an1.281-283:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for a man to hold the position of Sakka … the position of Māra … the position of Brahmā. That is possible."
an1.284:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no opportunity for misconduct in body to produce a result that is wished-for, pleasing, and agreeable. That is not possible.
an1.284:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for misconduct in body to produce a result that is unwished-for, displeasing, and disagreeable. That is possible."
an1.285-286:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no opportunity for misconduct in speech … misconduct in mind to produce a result that is wished-for, pleasing, and agreeable. That is not possible.
an1.285-286:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for misconduct in mind to produce a result that is unwished-for, displeasing, and disagreeable. That is possible."
